justification: The diff correctly migrates javax.* to jakarta.* and updates Spring Boot 2.6 to 3.3, but sets java.version to 17 instead of 21 and uses final var instead of var (which is fine but not Java 21 specific). The removal of @LazyCollection in favor of explicit fetch types is good, but the diff doesn't leverage any Java 21 features (records, pattern matching, etc.).
